channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT — 105 replies — 204.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT

Open thread • Replies: 105 • Updated: 2026-03-13 05:35 UTC

OP

You may all sperg the fuck out now. Never fucking selling.

Early replies (first 3)

61964214
>ZOG Swift intern casually poops LLM-generated report
>CHAINCHINK IS BOOMING BROS
actually delusional. $9.

61964222
don't care don't care
price price price
you lost the game, stinkies
PERIOD
stop trying to reclaim some shred of lost dignity. just take the heckin' L

61964252
>>61964222
i dont really give a fuck about link but this image disgusts me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968914
>>61968875
didnt read your slop lol Whatever you wrote still doesnt justify the XRP spammers being clinically retarded

61968946
>>61968616
>how the fuck does swift even make money

swift's purpose is not to make money. it's a co-op

they do collect some annual fees from the member banks to facilitate operations. they are not aiming to generate a profit, and they aren't taking a cut of cross border transactions if that's what you're thinking


not for nothing bro but you could've had answer to your q in like 15 seconds w ai search

61968951
>>61968914
>Whatever you wrote still doesnt justify the XRP spammers being clinically retarded

the funny part is you are the exact same as them

in your head your ego is telling you that you're a secret genius while the xrp cult just doesn't "get it". but the reality is they just went 7x last year while you made nothing

your ego is saving you from the brutal reality

61969258
>>61968951
so which one are you

61969267
>literal retard brown mentally ill gooners are making more money than you
feels bad man
but pain is temporary, glory is eternal! WAGMI MARINES

61969348
>>61964199
It's amazing the lack of interest in LINK. It's get the best news and doesn't move at all. In 2019 this news would have pumped it to $100.

61969656
>>61968951
>the funny part is you are the exact same as them

Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story. Token price doesnt matter here. Youre hung up on it only because it’s the only way you can downplay the fact that Chainlink got mentioned while XRP didnt lol. And just because link didn’t pump doesnt change the fact that Swift mentioned Chainlink.

61969683
>>61969656
>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story
yup

61969746
>>61965107
Take your delusional ramblings back to /pol/ you fuckin freak

61969776
>>61967953
no, it's a guy with severe mental illness who has been posting the same image occasionally in link threads for many years. he's probably been extremely blown the fuck out on whatever else he put his money into and can only get satisfaction by making fun of stinkies, because he didn't buyed when it was below a dollar

61969981
>>61969656
>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story.

and? bro you're cheering on an offshore company that you own zero equity in just like a sportsball fan

then you had to project me as some big xrp holder. i fucking wish. i actually bought the line that it was dead and didn't buy any this cycle

they used to say to always inverse biz, i should've listened

61969992
>>61969683
>>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story
>yup

you meant to say chainlink labs i believe


this doesn't help the funding token tho kid. you guys keep trying these marketing strategies that haven't worked for 5 years straight.

i take it you've never read what einstein had to say on repeating the same thing over and over

61970155
>>61969981
>and?
I didnt read anything you wrote except the first word.

61970161
>>61964199
>but chainlink was MENTIONED in the swift files

61970974
>>61965559
I don't understand how this fucking chat works. Someone spoonfeed me

61971436
>>61964199
>Price feeds that do zero for token price
>ONLY 20 YEARS TIL PRELIMINARY PRODUCT ROLLOUT!!!! (no exaggeration exactly what SWIFT said)

61972300
>>61968875
>>61968914
>>61970155
Since the Trump pump.

61972330
Cainlink psychosis episode 5789.
Yeah, if there’s ever another huge crypto hype cycle, then ‘muh Chainlink actually getting mentioned somewhere in something serious’ might trigger a massive hype wave and your coin might go to the moon - and hopefully you’ll cash out fast enough.
But honestly, this is getting very cult-like rn.

61972716
>>61972330
>getting
>rn
How new ARE you

61972800
It's over bros, LINK is not new tech, a hidden gem, or a coming 10-100x. LINK is mainstream and is in Twitter roasties bios. It’s a corporate entity now, so Sergey has to dump another 750k LINK to hire talent managers and diversity officers. LINK hasn’t been the biz token for over 5 years now. Just sell anons... i-i-iit’s over. It was a good ride marines.

61972902
>>61965107
>painting yourself blue
Dont threaten me with a good time
>cannibalism
Pure projection; Canninite-baalism you just tattled on yourself watch out for that bro.

61972933
>>61964199
these faggots have been doing trials for as long as i have been on /biz/ lmao. seriously, like 5 years...what the fuck are they doing?

61972954
>>61972933
DUDE JUST ANOTHER TRIAL I PROMISE THIS YEAR IS THE YEAR!!!!!!!!!!

61973267
Pull out of Chainlink while you can, before society portrays it as a Racist currency.

61973778
>>61972933
They are trialing and erroring

61975163
>>61970155
>I didnt read anything you wrote except the first word.

thanks for the update my boy

is my dry cleaning ready yet?

>>61972300

ok. are you saying i should buy some?

61975171
>>61972933
>these faggots have been doing trials for as long as i have been on /biz/

seriously lol
i still remember hearing about trials almost a decade ago

these fuckers run more trials than pfizer lmao

61975886
>>61975171
>10 peels by this ID

61976322
>>61964199
...wait did the mastercard ceo really say swift might not exist in 5 years (a few years ago)?
probably nothing right?

61977651
This is great and all, but most LLM's say it will be 10 years before any of this gets adopted, therefore driving up price, who TF wants to wait 10 years, not me. I'm considering unstaking half and enjoying my life.

item.title: FUCK THIS WAR — 27 replies — 108.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
FUCK THIS WAR

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-03-13 06:03 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61977431
>>61977427
17 buc-ees sammiches.
Slow down fat boy.

61977434
>>61977427
you can call your congressman (don't write/email them, they don't care about that), and ask them to vote no on the upcoming funding bill for the war.

61977461
>>61977434
I just want the US to win quickly

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977480
>>61977461
They can topple the regime quickly if Trump decides to put boots on the ground.

He won't do that though cause he cares more about political optics more than results.

61977486
>>61977461
even if it were to end today, prices of gas will remain like this for months... maybe until 2027 .

61977488
>>61977480
i want trump to get out of there quickly. Let bibi put israeli boots down .

61977491
>>61977480
>>61977488
Both should go boots on the ground with Israel leading. I'd prefer they die than our soldiers

61977501
>>61977491
only israeli boots on the ground. Its their war, they should die for it.
No more american lives.

61977511
Why do poorfag normies feel entitled to cheap gasoline when the price of everything else has inflated?? Drive less or buy an EV, jackass!

61977527
>>61977511
Maybe prices should stop inflating, then. You ever think about that, college boy?

61977569
>>61977511
I don't feel entitled to it, but I do feel bitter about having to pay more for gas after return to office mandates. None of this was necessary.

61977573
>>61977501
This benefits us in the long run too, less Chinese proxies (Venezuela, Iran) is a good thing.
Though I agree, Israelis should be on the front line.

61977574
HEY IM BONKIN HERE

61977579
>>61977573
by us do you mean elite pedophiles?

61977583
>>61977579
They should be killed.
But let's not be coy, China is no ally.
They want to take Taiwan, bad.
By cutting off their oil supply and allies, we win long term. Plain fact anon, irrespective of our country being filled with disgusting Jewish pedophiles.

61977589
>>61977573
Moshi, how is tel aviv right now ?
This costs the United states money, lives, and costs trump policital capital that he could use to push some other legislation through. This war is unecessary.
This war strengthens russia and china since china is the main manufacturer of green energy .

61977590
>>61977589
Read my posts retard, we have IDs for a reason.

61977596
>>61977590
Sure thing moshi, saying benign things about jews to cover your agenda will not work. These are played out tricks.

61977630
>>61977427
>My heckin gas prices.....
It's a small price to pay to win Israel's war for them.

61977647
>>61977427
Go iran go!

61977652
>>61977501
U dont get this moloch stuff. Dont. Ya?

61977654
>>61977480
Nobody wants boots on the ground except for psychopathic neocons like you. If we have near complete control over the skies just keep striking them until they wave the white flag, either literally or proverbially.

61977659
>>61977427
you voted for this

61977674
>>61977654
>If we have near complete control over the skies
you have no control over the skies and you will not get control over the skies. hence, ground forces

61977686
>>61977427
I wonder if we will get cheaper fuel in EU than US before GTA6

61977729
>>61977654
>If we have near complete control over the skies just keep striking them until they wave the white flag
Air strikes alone has NEVER led to a change in government.
>psychopathic neocons
I don't want boots on the ground, I didn't want the airstrikes in the first place. Who started bombing who again? Can you remind me?

item.title: Is GLD still good to buy? I've been dca-ing for the past year every paycheck. Probably wouldn't sell for at least anothe… — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is GLD still good to buy? I've been dca-ing for the past year every paycheck. Probably wouldn't sell for at least anothe…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-13 05:53 UTC

OP

Is GLD still good to buy? I've been dca-ing for the past year every paycheck. Probably wouldn't sell for at least another year.

Early replies (first 3)

61974550
>>61974504
It's not going to be doing major 10x moves, gold is going to crab around within a 20% range for a few years and then start going towards 8-10k/oz by 2035.

It's already at the most extreme valuation relative to US house prices ever. One could argue that it still has room to go up because china caused the parabolic move this time, not the US. But that also means you risk is tied to chinese sentiment.

61974617
>>61974550
Would you suggest anything else? I'm just trying to outperform the sp500 with the best ROI I can.

I would think GLD still does well based on de-dollarization, inflation, and the failure of fiat currencies

61974675
>>61974504
yes

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61974742
>>61974617
>I'm just trying to outperform the sp500 with the best ROI I can

If that's your criteria then all you have to do is nothing, the S&P isn't going anywhere but down from here. It hasn't gone up in like 5 months now with some of the biggest sectors selling off and money just rotating around.

Alot of people are expecting a drop to the liberation tariff low and then a bump to put in the biggest head and shoulders pattern in history before crashing to zero when the boomers start to panic sell.

The government will be printing infinitytrillion dollars over the next decade to pay for the retired boomers, buy gold if you want to preserve your current wealth.

61974795
>>61974742
Yeah, I still keep my 401k for it, but anything in my brokerage I'm trying out outperform it and SGOV. So far, so good. Any thoughts on BTC? Probably will dca under 50k

61977355
>>61974675
why?

61977454
theres a weekly fvg at ~3700 i would scale out and dca into TQQQ over the next your spread your buys dca

61977671
>>61974504
Nope, US gold market is beyond fucked and are heavily manipulated via spoofing.

Stick to international exchanges if you can.

61977692
>>61977454

61977709
6 grand eoy says every bank.
I do wonder about wall street price targets though, what incentive could they have to publish price targets other than to manipulate liquidity in a given asset. If I've got a zillion shares of some trash I want to unload why wouldn't I tell you it's gonna 1.5x this year?

61972206
>>61972083

61975900

61977683

item.title: TOTAL. WAGIE. DEATH. — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
TOTAL. WAGIE. DEATH.

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-03-13 05:51 UTC

OP

Step 1. You take out a loan
Step 2. You pay it back

It's really that simple.

Early replies (first 3)

61977668
how do I long homelessness lol

61977694
an unemployed 17 year old with bad credit and no cosigner can borrow up to $12,500 from the feds for their first year of college. Try borrowing $12,500 unsecured with no income and bad credit.
your 2 step is disingenuous because in reality it's
step 1 you apply for a loan
step 2 you get approved/denied for a loan
step 3 you pay it back
but the government is happy to do you a favor and give you a loan you can't be denied for and follows you through bankruptcy.

61977696
>>61977648
Why can't people take accountability for their actions?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977701
Step 1 graduate early.
Step 2 sign pell at 17
Step 3 nobody checks age
Step 4 you made a minor sign a contract?

item.title: LINK WILL BE $81K EOY AND FUDDIES WILL ROPE — 10 replies — 13.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
LINK WILL BE $81K EOY AND FUDDIES WILL ROPE

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-13 05:20 UTC

OP

Okay hear me out

The potential for 81K is possible though ironically. When you account for staking locking up 95% or even more of the circulating supply(350 Mil, the rest are spoken for on nodes already). I suspect by 2026 BTC will only have around 35-40% dominance as well, projects with specific applications will begin to take hold. Oracles, various layer 1's that enable Smart contracts, DEFI, decentralized cloud computing, decentralized cloud storage, and probably other things that haven't even been conceptualized yet.

We are supposed to see at least 8 Trillion MCAP by 2025 of all crypto according to the experts. Klaus Schwab mentions this in his book.

I think we will see 4-5 Trillion at the peak of the next bullrun easy. That will probably be early to mid 2022. Next peak bull run will probably mid to late 2026 which could easily run 16-20 Trillion MCAP of all crypto. In the scheme of things that is only around 18-25% of the global GDP. Its honestly not that much.

Now lets say LINK network protocol captures 4 Trillion by 2026 peak bull run. At even 80% staking saturation (70 Million circulating supply) the price is close to 60,000 per LINK, around 57,000. At 15% circulating supply, its 52.5 Million LINK with a 4 Trillion MCAP is 76,000 per LINK.

These numbers sound ridiculous at first or to the uniniated but again when you understand what LINK is/does its honestly not. We are buying a share of the fat protocol that will monetize Web 3.0. I mean think if HTTPS would have been monetized. The Internet itself is worth around 19 Trillion and when you add in data accumulated from the "Internet of Things", it adds a 5-10x multiplier roughly.

The Internet is more or less 25 years old for the masses as a whole. If there were 350 Million shares circulating, they would be worth just under 54,000 each at its current estimated value.

The pic related is fun and entertaining but ironically achievable in the time frame suggested

Discuss

Early replies (first 3)

61976786
1,000 81,000 EOY

61977063
IT IS HAPPPENING
>Tonight

61977097
>>61976771
I'm going to baghold this pos to zero, aren't I?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977114
Wait wtf is this lego anon? The skitzp who chronicled our journey to /bant/?

61977153
TOKEN
NOT
NEEDED

61977164
>>61977153
Are you?

61977202
>>61976771
Thinks my post is spam.

61977221
worthless stinkies
your delusion is strong
but i WILL break you

61977336
>>61977221
What gives you worth according to yourself, friend? i advise you to shut the fuck up now.

61977612
>>61976771
Never once heard Chainlink on mainstream news outlets, but I hear about Solana, XRP, BTC, ETH, and occasionally XLM.

item.title: It's over. The US is collapsing. — 20 replies — 52.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
It's over. The US is collapsing.

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-13 05:43 UTC

OP

It's over. The US is collapsing.

Early replies (first 3)

61977357
>restrict the collapse

Get. Fucked. Brokie.

61977369
>>61977357
What happens when you hold bags for scams.
Who cares about fundamentals when like go up!

61977377
>>61977348
Oh shit, I need to check my Lehman Brothers portfolio.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61977379
>>61977348
>The US is collapsing, we're winning!!!
Okay, Iranian bot.

61977380
>>61977348
STOP THE REDEEMING

61977383
>>61977379
Cutting out inefficiencies out is part of a healthy economy. Bailouts just preserve the inevitable with unhealthy companies.

61977391
>>61977379
Cope

61977399
bros...but i thought the great american economy would never collapse again? where's the money printer? our masters demand it.

61977458
>>61977379
No you're right. You should buy more, buy as much as you can with all of your money.

61977475
>>61977458
I wholeheartedly agree. A bunch of retards are panic selling, that's exactly the time to buy.
When everyone is panicking, buy.
When everyone is euphoric, sell.

Everyone is panicking and thinking the worlds going to end.
>OMGEEEE GAS PRICES WENT UP A LITTLE, PANICK!!!!!
>OMGEEE SOME PRIVATE INVESTMENT COMPANIES HALTED WITHDRAWALS, PANICK!!!!!

61977582
>>61977348
Kek goyim in the real world, what did you not understand about owning nothing? Fundsu safu in the binancu accontu!

61977585
Is this real or a nothingburger?

61977599
>>61977399
In israel

61977602
>>61977585
really dones't matter much

61977620
>>61977475

I’m gonna screenshot this post

61977625
>>61977585
Nothing ever seems to happen.

61977635
>>61977475
You don’t catch a falling knife, you wait until you see the first signs of things bottoming out/reversing. Just a week ago the market was still having solid green all across the board, I would wait a few weeks to see how thing play out before putting any serious money in.

61977638
>ok check it out my business model is a blackbox writing bad loans for unworthy creditors
>I know they're good for it because we poach junior analysts from investment firms so we know who jp morgan thought about but ultimately wouldn't lend to but it's your money so IDGAF
>TAKE MY MOTHERFUCKING MONEY NOW
in hindsight, there may have been signs that private credit was a risky investment

61977640
>>61977585
It's real, there's even mainstream publications highlighting the bullshit the valuations these companies have for their assets, hedge funds are taking positions against the major players

https://www.ft.com/content/d0014b3a-94bf-4f78-8f47-64fca522e373

61977681
>>61977640
Fundsu safu goy!

I’m 33 and it literally feels like last week I was 20. It’ll happen to you too. One day you’re eating avocado toast and the next you’re in your 30’s.

61974769
>>61974713
I’m 41 and a father to three children
Also a finance nigga

61974851
>>61970056
>we

lol you're not building anything because you're a soft dork

get real you weenie

61974868
>>61974744
Same nigga and I’m also 41
Sheeit nigga the last 20 years was like a flash in the pan. Life goes fast and the messed up thing is that the older you get the faster it seems to pass by.

61974971
>>61974713
I've been on 4chan since I was 11 years old. The days when you could be banned for being underaged. you really never leave this place, no matter what. You might take long breaks, but this place still lures you back here and there.
There are still good discussions on here where you'd be hard pressed to find them anywhere else on the web.

61975092
>>61960451
>*Crack*
>*Sip*
>How's the retro cheevo hunting going Bill?
>Yup, I'm catching on old games. Say, ya ever play Advance Wars Days of Ruin?
>No, what is it?
>Kino I missed out on
>What ya playing on?
>Emu deck, easy to afford without a wife and kids
>Heh, don't remind me

t. 34yr old boomer

61975124
>>61960109
>Yo unc that's trash form no cap for fr, bussin ain't got you, know I'm sayin n sheeeeeeet?
>No? Oh alright then

61977571
>>61962532
Nig
Ger.
I've applied to over a hundred jobs. I got called back 5 times, I've been sent about 8 rejection letters, and I've only made it to an in person interview twice. ONE WAS AT MCDONALDS WHICH I GOT GHOSTED WHEN THEY WANTED TO RESCHEDULE.
I'm fucked, but also I'm about to be cut off foodstamps. So in 2 months I'll just starve to death and it'll all be fine :D

item.title: Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are… — 232 replies — 35.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are…

Open thread • Replies: 232 • Updated: 2026-03-12 23:37 UTC

OP

Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said
>what do you do to make $125k
>that is a lot
>are you in LA?
>why are you lying?
Then I said
>150k is middle class
>no offense, when others don’t believe others, it means they are poor or make less
Then he replied
>150k is not middle class
>60k-80k is middle class
I said
>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
Then he starts lying and saying he is 13
The conversation is just him seething someone makes $125k and arguing that 150k is not middle class.
I tell him due to increased cost of living and wealth gap, even 1m is nothing and 10% of 50% of the consumption and 90% are not doing well.
Why are poor people always seething?
$125k isn’t even middle class. How poor do you guys that guy is? 40k? 70k?
He was really defensive about $150k being middle class.
Do poor people think they are middle class?
This isn’t the first time this has happened.

Early replies (first 3)

61965995
>>61965964
Middle class is self sufficient, it requires an income that can support a household, retirement, children, education(including college), stay at home wife (or) nanny, 2+ modern cars, insurance, 1-3 vacations/yr . I would say 125k-250k depending on area. Lower class normies think they are middle class, middle class is mostly dead. Upper class has excess income after meeting those needs. Lower class requires gov assistance(welfare, healthcare, public school, etc).

61966005
>>61965964
>>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
When people ssay middle class they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k or something and can easily afford a suburban house in areas within 2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha and Dallas. Your idea of middle class is jetsetting around and banging sloots whenever you want.

61966016
>>61965995
> 1-3 vacations/yr .
1 vacation, maybe dude.
3? Lmao.
I think middle class lifestyle now requires a lot higher income than what people think now.
That wasn’t the first time someone got really defensive with “no, 60-80k is middle class.”
Fucking annoying but good conversation I guess. The ignorance is annoying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61972540
>>61967215
They live low class lives full of comforts. Better than peasants 100s years ago who has to farm and toil.

61972601
>>61971594
>bourgeoisie who have fuck you levels of money & power.

More like lazy parasites who were born into lazy larasitic bloodlines that control the government.

That's the highest level of wealth.
All should aim to be a lazy parasite.
The only way to do that is to become a deranged sex addict. Then money will flow 24/7 and money ideas etc.

>>61972540
true.

61972856
>>61972601
>All should aim to be a lazy parasite.
Kill yourself kike

61972864
>>61972856
>Kill yourself kike
I voted for this

61973005
>>61965995
By that definition I'm upper class. But doesn't feel like it.

61974567
>>61965964
I love reading these mercantilist disputes between Ameripoors.
>$150k is middle class!!!1!!1
>no you fucking subhuman nigger, for $150k you cannot even afford an apartment in a big city
>it's fault of jews/trump/biden/obama/mexicans
>$300k is middle class, not $150k!!!!!11!

What really matters, is how much you can save. There's a person who earns $50k but lives with his parents and saves up $40k yearly. And there is a person who earns $100k but throws out his money on everything and barely saves up $10k. And who's the winner here? Work smart, not hard.

61974600
>>61974567
Not really. Don’t give me that bullshit about someone saving 1k is more well off than someone with 150k income.
Dumb ass.
>>61973005
>excess income
You are supposed to afford those things comfortably.

61974633
>>61974567
> What really matters, is how much you can save. There's a person who earns $50k but lives with his parents and saves up $40k yearly. And there is a person who earns $100k but throws out his money on everything and barely saves up $10k. And who's the winner here? Work smart, not hard.
You’re the retarded earning 50k huh lol

61974733
>>61974600
I'm doing it quite comfortably. I have next to no expenses. I save around 80% of my income.

61974774
>>61974733
You missed the point of the op.
Making 150k vs 50k. Ignoring other dumb shit idiot anons like you pull out your ass.

61974793
>>61974774
I'm not gonna say how much I earn, but you are right, I'm a dumb retard. GN anon.

61975034
>>61974793
I don’t need to know anything specific bro.
If you need a job, then its usually less than 400k.

61975068
>>61975034
Close enough, consulting.

61975234
>>61975068
Yeah. Most jobs cap out. Not sure why you were so defensive. My main topic was 50k and 150k.
I was talking to some consulting guy in nyc and I told him I used to make 200k and now retired. And he got so angry and triggered.
>you do NOT make 200k!!!!!
And he said he works for high networth people. But if he did, why was 200k so surprising
(it is because most income caps out and out of the general population, 200k is rarer).
Thing is, most rich people know whats possible so to see him so defensive, he was probably busting his ass for his work.
One thing I learned is well off people always believe others.
Poor people almost always immediately reply with
>no you dont
>yeah and im elon musk
>ur lying

61975263
"Class" is a Marxist term designed to make you hate people richer than yourself.

The terminology falls apart with any examination. For example, a doctor making $500K per year is "working class" because he works, but is in the top 1% of incomes.

If you want to communicate properly, just say high income, middle income, low income, etc.

61975270
>>61975263
A doctor IS working class.
There is working class and capitalist class.

61975379
>>61975270
But a person earning $30K a year can put $3k into a dividend stock and start collecting "surplus value" which Marxists decry as capitalist theft. Is he a working class or capitalist class? What about a worker who slowly invests over 40 years until his dividends pay more than his wage, but he's still working?
The terminology fails hard to communicate anything useful.

61975502
>>61965995
If you can afford a nanny and three vacations a year you are upper class full stop. Most normies get two weeks a year tops, with some uncs capping out at four.

61975528
>>61975379
Posts like yours dont really promote discussion and just shit flinging.
You KNOW what capitalist class and working class is. Why you talking nonsense?
> What about a worker who slowly invests over 40 years until his dividends pay more than his wage, but he's still working?
Obviously after that, then you can start talking about the lifestyle his dividends can bring in.

61975585
>>61975379
Marxists are ugly losers.

61975620
>>61975502
3 vacations. Yeah. Like over a month vacation kek. Normal bottom 90% or even 95% cannot afford this.
And they face high gas prices, air tickets price increases and food inflation due to Iran War lmaoo

61976191
>>61965964
60-80k was middle class before covid. Now it's working poor.

61976253
>>61975263
Retard, class comes from ancient Rome.

61976584
>>61965995
>support a household
>retirement safe
>3 kids
>education & college done, kids will go there too
>insurance
>5 holidays a year
one car only and missing a stay at home wife since we both work
still have excess money.
all this on 50k a year while she makes 40k.
god i love being a euro"poor" lmao

61976633
>>61976584
>5 holidays a year
Lol. Doubt. Unless theyre cheap.
Size of house? Neighborhood? City?
Cost of living in city? What car?

61976651
>>61976584
Or maybe vacations are not overseas. Like flying across the ocean.

61976676
>>61976584
American properties are expensive if on valuable land. So is Europe if you live somewhere desirable.

61976695
>>61976633
>>61976651
>>61976676
attic, basement, 3 bedrooms, kitchen/bathroom/living room and a study room.
yard about the size of the house, wife grows plenty of stuff there for the fun of it and it does save some grocery bills in the end.
car isnt fancy, just a volvo XC60, the city is båstad you can look it up if you want, its 100% white.

but yeah paid sick leave too, union is strong here and my salary have yearly assured raises, life looking good.

61976707
>>61976695
Not bad. Very middle class.
100% white. So…is it vhcol or mcol?

61976727
>>61976695
Based my man.

I recently moved into the german Eifel, roughly 690m2 property with 180m2 living space. House is about done, had to deal with shitty Internet Connection but Starlink rules. It's considerable "cheap" to build here because nobody wants to live on the countryside but countryside only means a 20 minute trip with the nearest train in a European country

Expecting our first kid in august so it will get lively in here. All of this on a 55k home-office job and her working in a close-by cosmetic surgery clinic. Maybe I can take the little one to his first trip to Ibiza somewhat next year, maybe 2 or 3 weeks at once - holiday planning is relaxed but if necessary I'm just gonna take some of that paid sick-leave right before my vacation - lol.

What are they gonna do? Can't fire me - kek.

item.title: Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill? — 33 replies — 25.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-13 04:48 UTC

OP

Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?

Just did my taxes MFJ and I got like an $8k refund, normally I pay.

Plus they are cuter and less bitchy than their western counterparts.

Early replies (first 3)

61976375
>>61976281
im tempted for the easymode but cba living in SEA

61976386
I want a cute, loving Nigerian bf who will make me jollof rice, bros...

61976398
>>61976281
>Why haven't you taken the passport bro/foreign wife pill?
I have dignity

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61976417
>>61976386
i'm nigerian but i don't know if i'm "cute"
i'll learn to suck dick and get really /fit/ for you if you get me out of this hellhole tho

61976456
>>61976398
Luka Doncic just got divorced so, if that dignity I don't want it.

61976471
>>61976417
How tall are you?

61976509
1. I don't want to get scammed.
2. If I wanted a Flip wife I could easily find a nurse here but I've dated a Filipina before and yeah they're alright people but they're also culturally Mormons and don't really value learning for its own sake. They make god-tier wives I'm sure but they behave more like your nurse with the addition of being super-clingy and kinda nuts, also you can expect to be sending 10% of your money back to her family.
3. Visa fees and the general process for citizenship are no joke. This is on top of catalogue wives not really being able to earn much money or deal with a new society (if you don't want to live in some Africa-tier hell).

I've thought about it a lot over the years but I'm also very aware that half the reason I'm not married is my own standards. If I do end up biting the bullet on this I'd go to Romania/Moldova.

61976549
>>61976281
I'm rich and thin but I'm balding so I doubt they'll want me.

61976595
>>61976549
Reread the first two words you posted and you’ll understand they do want you and nothing else matters.

61976603
>>61976509
1. Vet better you ain't finding a wife at the Bars
2. I've seen tons of women in the west implode their marriages on overspending/unwillingness to yield. Also plenty send money to their parents too. They just have KWEEN atittude, sending money ain't bad as you think keeps the in-laws on my side and make sure she never thinks twice about divorcing. I make more than enough.
3. Yea this is shit overall, can't avoid it.

61976648
>>61976595
I want to be loved though not used for my money. I want a family with 4-6 children and a loving wife.

61976660
>>61976648
Love starts from marriage, the moment you recognize that resources are the most important thing then you can move down the list. I would rather prefer a pragmatic wife, It is women natural state since the dawn of time.

61976686
>>61976281
How are you getting a foreign wife? You likely have to live in the country where you want to get a foreign wife, but to do that you either need to have enough money that you live off the interest or you somehow have to find a job in a foreign country where you don’t speak the language. Basically, the step is to have money (min $1-2 million).

61976703
because i want my family and friends to respect me

61976711
>>61976281
Cause im not a piece of shit incel loser like you.
People like you should get sterelized, if not euthanized. Genetic dead end garbage

61976723
>>61976281
Does holding hands count as first base?

61976726
>>61976281
I already have taken the tight asian pussy pill. Fuck white women.

61976734
>>61976603
You're just listing the standard issues, find a good wife. If you can't find a good wife at home then the problem is probably you which explains why these marriages fail.

>sending money ain't bad as you think keeps the in-laws on my side and make sure she never thinks twice about divorcing

I'm not sending 10% of what I earn to a community of cousins who don't work and other nonsense. I even date East Asian women in my own city but they're the higher class who can afford to pay their own way to be here so it's much better.

>>61976726
>posts some OF thot shilling engagement

Yeah nah.

61976740
>>61976711
>I'm going to die alone
>At least I'm not an incel!

61976755
>>61976734
Nah dude I literally just explained, she only send money to her parents. That it i've made it clear, it like fucking nothing in the grand scheme of things, she more than makes up for it through the lower tax bracket.

Meanwhile I don't have someone bitching about why she isn't getting an LV bag or going on some super expensive european trip this year.

61976763
I’m the happiest I’ve ever been with my TTT wife. Thai. Trad. Troon. Yeah I hold LINK. How did you know?

61976766
I kind of wish I were adventurous enough to try that. Realistically it’s my only chance to ever date. There’s absolutely no way that you can just start dating from scratch in your 30s otherwise.

61976767
>>61976281
I'm genuinely too autistic to even understand how you meet them, same issue with making "friends"

61976939
>>61976417
>actual nigerian scammers on this board
Burn it all down.

61976970
>>61976281
Let me guess. He met her on soi6 in Pattaya or on AfterSkool BJ bar on soi cowboy in BKK

61976976
>>61976970
She's Chinese you dumb fuck, watch the video

61976982
>>61976726
>those blue veins showing through her pale skin
GIB MILKIES

61977074
>>61976740
Id rather die alone than being a coping incel freak like you. You genetic dead end garbage deserve nothing but suffering. Kill yourself you worthless faggot

61977102
>>61977074
>Genetic Dead End
>Meanwhile will have a family and kids

LMAO.

61977118
>>61977074
>you should be alone! and dead! and broke!
ok glowie calm down

61977223
>>61977074
the sad thing is that this is all projection...

im sorry anon, i hope you feel better some day.

no onw i genetic garbag, we all made it this far. we all deserve to love and be loved. even if its highly conditional

61977275
>>61976660
>It is women natural state since the dawn of time.
?

61977541
>>61976281
because i'm not an ugly faggot, i walked down the street from my apartment and got a girlfriend, it's not fucking hard, just be handsome and make decent money

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 50 replies — 16.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-03-13 02:59 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

61933757

61933779
>>61932834

i dont sell my dotty

61936705

61951573

75 in 2 year

61956435

61959501

61960135
>>61956435

All the oilfags and metalfags are missing easy money here

61962631
>>61942667

61962633

61962637
>>61962631

61962645

$TDOT is the first-ever @Polkadot

It’s official.
The first Polkadot U.S. ETF is live and trading on Nasdaq.
"

61962682
>>61962633
DOT IS GOING TO THE MOON

61962686
https://www.21shares.com/en-us/products-us/tdot 11.3m$ of inflows in the first day. They're also considering staking at some point.

>>61962682

61962688
>>61962682
>DOT IS GOING TO THE MOON
100$ end of bull run

61962693

61962715
i dont sell, i dont care

61962726
>>61962715

I DOT buy, I DOT care

61965530
DOT? That thing is put into my brakes?

61966637
back to $1?

61968186
>>61966637

>i don't sell, i don't care

61968274
This crypto is 1.50.
The fuck?

Not a stock!

61971016
https://polkadothalving.com/ 2 more days

61971138
Prepare yourselves guys. A once in a lifetime event is about to happen. The millennial lunar eclipse is about to happen.

61972032
>>61971138
Locked and loaded fellow DOThead

61972844
>>61932834
This is the pedochain and the total ruin of investors. This crap is just going to go lower, all the way to zero.

61975396
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2031796064085242150
"
Ongoing economic upgrade for Polkadot introduces DOT scarcity in 3 days.

The first Polkadot Halving will deliver a daily reduction of issuance by 53%:
• Maximum supply: 2.1B DOT
• Reduced long-term inflation
• A more predictable monetary model
"

I just hope you guys understand that even though the inflation is dropping that this WILL NOT have an immediate effect. Stuff takes time. If you believe that the price will sky rocket after the inflation drop then you're in for a disappointing experience.

61976472
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9jK-NcRmVcw
https://polkadothalving.com/ 1 more day

61976836
>>61975396

61977306

on

61964536

61964540

61964600
>>61954004

their demographics and mental/physical health are far worse today than 2 decades ago so i don't understand why so many anons are disappointed at them, as if you hold goycattle to high standards

61964812
>>61954140
The plan is for ISRAEL to dominate the world.
Escalation is necessary and so is mutt blood.

61969335
>>61954140
The thing is, the scenario of Iranians closing down the strait the moment they're backed into a corner has been talked about since forever. Though I suppose after a few major escalations (2020, 12-day war), of which both of them were done under Trump's orders, he thought that Iran wouldn't dare, that they don't have the capability to do such a thing.

61969384
>>61955810
that jak meme is infinitely funnier than your shitty magic the gathering meme

61969494
>>61956133
>Libtards controlled and censored all of social media until Elon bought Twitter.
And now Elon does the same with any opinion that disagrees with him, left or right wing. Just accept that you are a retard.

61971493
>>61954004
Infuriating

61971579
>>61964540
what you're saying is praise judaism

61971592
>>61954140
Iran are not arabs/moors. They have high IQ and know how to deal with the Great Satan with intelligence.
In other words, FAFO

61971605
>>61954039
>>61957437
Umm guys do you know what NATO is? NATO is that thing that forces "eurochads" to join US in every Middle Eastern suicide pact. Did you forget Iraq?

61971620
>>61969335

61971631
>>61971605
NATO is totally broken now, burger. And if a european leader even suggested to go die for jews with the US, the ""far"" right would win the elections with a super-majority. They are dumb, but not as dumb as burgers.

61971810
>>61956993

61971850
>>61954970

>It's the Hebrew/English variant

61971852
>>61955310

61971874
>>61955310
Hell is being caught between both parties bullshit

61971906
>>61954970
>geg
Too obvious

61971921
>>61956866
They're just concealing their pedophilia. Dismiss them

61971976
>>61958149
Literally, figuratively, unironically yes, that is precisely what is happening. With Larry Ellison buying ALL (no that is not an exaggeration) of the legacy media (CBS, CNN, HBO, etc.) on behalf of Israel and the massive Israeli disinfo bots on Reddit, here, X, TikTok etc. The absolute lowest common denominator, bottom of the barrel normie legitimately believes "America is winning! War is over1!!!1!!". You have to be, as the YNs say, "Tapped In" in order to know how dire the situation reallly is. The Jewish disinfo bots aren't as bad here on /biz/ as they are on /pol/ and /b/ but they're here. They're the ones spewing bullshit like what you replied to. Luckily the veil keeps lifting as the days go by and the bots can't drown out ALL of the truthful posts from social media, so it becomes quite easy to become "Tapped In.". When the entirety of the media tells you we are winning, but then you go to the gas station for your daily fill-up of your lifted F-350 Super Duty with the double cabin that you bought at 27% APR for 96 months and see the 90 cent overnight price increase, you start to question whether we really are "winning" and that leads you to Google which leads you to the current news of how an American oil tanker was just shot by a missile, very clearly contradicting the "We are winning." narrative. Even the most retarded conservative boomer who bought that truck at those horrible rates can still add 1+1.

61971989
>>61971976
>YNs
what

61972961
>>61954004
Oh look, he saved caps lock for the part where he insults Americans again, instead of just turning it on for the entire post. Thats nice. Fuckin boomers scum.

61973140
>>61971631
Anon, the far right are statistically the biggest Israel glazers on earth.
Just look at Millei, Orban, Fico, MAGA, and the rest of the clowns. """"Conservatives"""" have been insisting that sucking off Bibi is the real trad way for ages and they're still at it.

61973149
>>61971989
young niggas

61973750
>>61956133
> you are not allowed to post lies
> posts lies a lot
> gets banned
NOOOOOOO IM BEING CENSORED FOR MY POLITICAL OPINIONS REEEEEEEEEEEEEE

61974076
>>61954918
>I just can't understand
No shit

On another note I found a 10k gold ring in my kitchen today.

61974185
>>61954918
They’ve been brainwashed ever since the mid 90s with angry man talk radio. Then Fox News. Then the boomer internet. 3 of my family members fell victim to that scam, one of them even became a schizo mountain hermit because of it.

item.title: WHAT THE FUCK IS HAPPENING — 25 replies — 12.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHAT THE FUCK IS HAPPENING

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-03-13 04:04 UTC

OP

YOU FUCKING NIGGERS I'M GONNA GET RUINED

Early replies (first 3)

61976923
>>61976906
I promise you, dear Bobo, nothing ever happens.

61976931
>>61976906
my pp is hard

61976942
THIS IS BLANTANT MARKET MANIPULATION. THIS IS DISGUSTING. DISGUSTING BLATANT MANIPULATION.

FUCKKKKKKKKKKKKKK

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61976958
>>61976906
You should have shorted the stock market. BTC is being used by Iran to tranfer money without jewish interference.

61976980
>>61976942
I told you the other day. Why did you believe it was going down?

61976984
TOP IS IN BULL NIGGERS

61976988
Sorry, Bobo. Sorry that you didn't listen.

61977023
>>61976980
BECAUSE IT DOESN'T MAKE ANY FUCKING SENSE. IRAN IS WINNING. AND THEY'RE NOT GONNA SURRENDER. INFLATION IS GONNA HIT THE ENTIRE WORLD SO HARD THAT IT MIGHT TAKE US MANY YEARS TO RECOVER.

THIS IS BLATANT MARKET MANIPULATION. AMERICANS AND THAT JEWISH AMERICAN DEMON HOMOSEXUAL BESSENT IS MANIPULATING EVERYTHING SO HARD AND SO BLATANTLY IT FILLS ME WITH RAGE!!!!

61977061
Bullfags don't even have a reason for it to be pumping....
>Sustainable Pump.
>Source? Trust me bro.

61977066
>>61977061
It's just market manipulation. Pure war against humanity.

61977075
>>61977061
bitcoin desires to go up. what other reason does it need?

61977104
>>61977061
You've got the narrative backwards. There's literally no reason at all for the price to go down. But there's a ton of reasons for it to go up.

61977124
>>61976906
One more small pump and my net worth will be above $2 million again. GLORIOUS

61977182
>>61976906
Put everything on oil.

61977187
>>61977182

Fuck oil, faggot.

61977189
>>61977066
Checked. And that war is ever ongoing since our species exists. It will not be over soon.
Fuck the middle east by the way. Why would we even care?
It needs to be rubbed in these niggers faces that we do NOT NEED them.

61977200
>>61976906
tf are you complaining about you bobonigger? Everything is in the red but shitcoins who are micropenis greencandling.

61977253
>>61977182
oil is fucking rugging

61977266
>>61977253
From $98 to $96? Yeah bro what a rug

61977274
>>61977200
>Everything is in the red but shitcoins who are micropenis greencandling.

exactly. Bitcoin should be getting fucked right now as it waterfalls to $42k.

61977283
>>61977023
Are you Hasan Piker?

61977351
never bet agaist bitcoin lmao. i thought this was evident 10 years ago.

61977401
>>61977351

What are people even trying to trade on?

> they learn more about Bitcoin and why they don't have enough

Everything else is just gambling.

61977435
>>61977351
Yeah, it's not like it dumps 80% every 4 years
